title: Furina client
description: cpvp client/modpack made for tier tests and for other gamemodes and for a fps boost using sodium and nvidum
body:
# FURINA 
### Furina Client Is A Modpack designed for the Use Of CPVP, PVP & etc...
### It Has Some PVP Utility Mods, Which will improve your Experience While PVPing
### Furina Client Is Also Greatly Optimized, Sweet sweet FPS Boost!!!


Warning: This pack is still in alpha stages, things are bound to change!

##


# [ CREDITS ]

- Farina client is made by T2ws
